reviewer: Independent production and evidence acceptance agent
scope: Source bindings, verifier output, runtime states, destination recovery, falsification, proof receipts and bounded re-review after the data-URI favicon runtime repair.
findings: System manifest, source snapshot, control and screenshot bindings have zero drift.
Static verifier passes 28 of 28 checks including fail-closed bootstrap and visible-copy jargon exclusion.
All 22 runtime cases pass without overflow, console, page or unexpected request failures.
All seven destinations pass HTTP, expected landmark and recovery checks.
Final Human-QA and plausible-control events are hash-bound and the system_build gate passes.
All 12 source artifacts are rebound; the favicon removes the only missing-resource request while no-JS and script-failure remain fail-closed.
residuals: This is pre-publish acceptance; the public GitHub Pages URL still needs post-deploy proof.
Cross-browser and real-device readiness are not claimed.
Volatile public content must be refreshed after expiry.
Specific Onest binaries do not yet have a separate provenance and local license receipt.
Brand and product-screenshot publication authority remains with the VibeUs owner.
